title: SyncItem
description: A single item in a sync response representing a content change event.

type.description: The type of sync event. Possible values: entry_published, entry_unpublished, entry_deleted, asset_published, asset_unpublished, asset_deleted, content_type_deleted.

data.description: The content data associated with this sync event.

content_type_uid.description: The UID of the content type for entry-related events.

locale.description: The locale of the content for locale-specific events.
